content: Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep
name: Barbarian
description: Bandit class mod for Krieg the Psycho, built around Fire Fiend, Blood Trance, and Salt the Wound. Close-range melee focus with a rage mechanic, it rolls additional bonuses from two pools.
notes: Earlier versions of the Good variant could mistakenly slow reloads instead of speeding them up; this has since been corrected. The mod is themed after tabletop Barbarians, focusing on light or no armour and close-range melee power, often backed by a rage-style boost. The item card may show incorrect fire rate, reload speed, and accuracy values.

special.description: At max level, the mod rolls one bonus from each of two pools. Pool 1: Neutral gives +58.5% magazine size, Chaotic gives +58.5% fire rate, Lawful gives +58.5% accuracy. Pool 2: Neutral gives +58.5% magazine size, Evil gives +58.5% critical hit damage, Good gives +58.5% reload speed. True Neutral is the double magazine size prefix, giving +93.6% magazine size.
